subcodes.first_line: If thou art mindful of the letter Jím, convey it; otherwise, leave it to consume itself in its own fire until it enters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حرف جیم را اگر متذکر باشد القا کن والا دعه بنفسه لیحترق بنارها الی ان یدخل
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
